description: A single clearly-fake credential marker. It represents any envelope credential, gateway bearer, issuance handle result, or run-report token. The contract checker greps EVERY other workflow fixture for this exact marker and asserts it is absent: envelope/gateway credentials, workflow provenance, and activation context must never enter the resolved plan, observed run, receipts, control commands, checkpoint manifests, workflow SQLite, raw/normalized events, transcripts, or ordinary logs. The marker legitimately lives only in the private encrypted credential store, which is out of scope for these transport fixtures.
